description: Bonifacio Caput, an environmental engineer, was struck on the head by a falling tool. He is conscious but presents with a severe headache, mild confusion, and dizziness. As the occupational health technician, complete the concussion protocol in GNU Health for this patient. Document the diagnosis as Concussion and record a clinical evaluation including his GCS findings (Eyes: To voice, Verbal: Confused, Motor: Obeys commands) and a pain level of 6. Prescribe Acetaminophen/Paracetamol, order a baseline bleeding lab (CBC or Coagulation panel), and schedule a Return-to-Work clearance follow-up appointment 3 to 7 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
